description: A two-panel red-white-and-blue DHS designed infographic promoting self-deportation via the 'CBP Home' app, structured as a benefits-vs-consequences contrast. The top header band is blue with bold white text: 'MESSAGE TO ILLEGAL ALIENS:' (smaller line) over 'A WARNING TO SELF-DEPORT' (large). The upper/blue section, headed 'Benefits:', shows a photograph of a hand holding a smartphone displaying the CBP Home app screen (titled 'Departing Traveler' with a map of the U.S. and menu items 'Verify Departure', 'View My Departure', 'Submit Intent To Depart'). The listed benefits in white text: 'Self-deportation is safe. Leave on your own terms by picking your departure flight.'; 'Keep money earned in the U.S. If you self-deport as a non-criminal illegal alien.'; 'Future opportunity for legal immigration. If you self-deport using CBP Home instead of being deported by ICE.'; 'Possible Flights Home. You may be eligible to a subsidized flight if you cannot afford to leave.' The lower section switches to a dark-red background, headed 'Consequences:', listing punitive items: 'Immediate deportation. You will be apprehended by DHS with no opportunity to get your affairs in order beforehand.'; 'Fines and penalties. A fine of $998 per day if you received a final order of removal and stayed.'; 'A fine of $1,000 - $5,000 if you fail to self-deport after claiming that you will.'; 'Possible imprisonment. If you fail to self-deport, you may be subject to jail time.'; 'Barred from returning. Prohibited from reentering the U.S. through the legal immigration system.' The circular blue DHS seal appears bottom-right. The propaganda technique is a classic carrot-and-stick / fear appeal: blue 'safe' benefits versus red 'threat' consequences, pressuring undocumented immigrants to leave voluntarily. Target audience: undocumented immigrants in the U.S.
notable_text: MESSAGE TO ILLEGAL ALIENS: A WARNING TO SELF-DEPORT. Benefits: Self-deportation is safe... Keep money earned in the U.S... Future opportunity for legal immigration... Possible Flights Home... Consequences: Immediate deportation... Fines and penalties. A fine of $998 per day... A fine of $1,000 - $5,000... Possible imprisonment... Barred from returning.
